blended.narrative: Stoneham is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,310 ft. Looking ahead, 29 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
